title: Auriculardisia rufa
taxonomy: Auriculardisia rufa is classified in the plant kingdom, belonging to the family Lauraceae. This family is commonly known as the laurel family and is composed of around 45 genera. Auriculardisia rufa is part of the genus Auriculardisia, which is a small genus of flowering plants. The Lauraceae family is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. Members of this family are known for their aromatic leaves and are often used in traditional medicine and perfumery.
